entries.round: task:Use the 'web_search' tool to search for 'site:producthunt.com AI sales agent lead conversion chatbot RAG' or similar queries to find recent AI SaaS products that automatically convert website visitors into customers (like AI SDRs, autonomous sales chatbots). Find 3-4 direct competitors. Analyze them based on: 1. Name & Tagline, 2. Core Mechanics (do they use RAG, Tool Calling for calendar/CRM?), 3. Target Audience & Pricing. Output a comprehensive report using EXACTLY <write_file path="docs/competitors_ph.md">content</write_file> syntax. Do not output anything else.
